name: django-unfold

metadata.name: django-unfold
metadata.summary: Modern Django admin theme for seamless interface development

documentation:
![screenshot](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/b5ec09b6-c8c7-454a-85af-1bba97593632)

## Unfold Django Admin Theme

[![PyPI - Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/django-unfold.svg?style=for-the-badge)](https://pypi.org/project/django-unfold/)
[![Build](https://img.shields.io/github/actions/workflow/status/unfoldadmin/django-unfold/release.yml?style=for-the-badge)](https://github.com/unfoldadmin/django-unfold/actions?query=workflow%3Arelease)
![Pre Commit](https://img.shields.io/badge/pre--commit-enabled-brightgreen?logo=pre-commit&logoColor=white&style=for-the-badge)
![Code Style - Ruff](https://img.shields.io/badge/code%20style-ruff-30173D.svg?style=for-the-badge)

Unfold is a theme for Django admin that incorporates common best practices for building full-fledged admin areas. It is designed to work on top of the default administration provided by Django.

- **Documentation:** Full docs are available at [unfoldadmin.com](https://unfoldadmin.com?utm_medium=github&utm_source=unfold).
- **Unfold:** Demo site is available at [unfoldadmin.com](https://unfoldadmin.com?utm_medium=github&utm_source=unfold).
- **Formula:** Repository with demo implementation at [github.com/unfoldadmin/formula](https://github.com/unfoldadmin/formula?utm_medium=github&utm_source=unfold).
- **Turbo:** Django & Next.js boilerplate implementing Unfold at [github.com/unfoldadmin/turbo](https://github.com/unfoldadmin/turbo?utm_medium=github&utm_source=unfold).
- **Discord:** Join the Unfold community on [Discord](https://discord.gg/9sQj9MEbNz).



## Are you using Unfold and need help?

Have you decided to start using Unfold but don’t have time to make the switch from the native Django admin? [Get in touch with us](https://unfoldadmin.com/consulting?utm_medium=github&utm_source=unfold) and let’s supercharge your development with our expertise.

## Features

- **Visual**: Provides a new user interface based on the Tailwind CSS framework.
- **Sidebar:** Simplifies the creation of sidebar navigation with icons, collapsibles, and more.
- **Dark mode:** Supports both light and dark mode versions.
- **Actions:** Offers multiple ways to define actions within different parts of the admin interface.
- **Filters:** Custom dropdowns, numeric, datetime, and text fields.
- **Dashboard:** Includes helpers for creating custom dashboard pages.
- **Components:** Reusable UI components such as cards, buttons, and charts.
- **WYSIWYG widget:** Built-in support for WYSIWYG (Trix).
- **Array widget:** Built-in widget for `django.contrib.postgres.fields.ArrayField`.
- **Inline tabs:** Groups inlines into tab navigation in the change form.
- **Model tabs:** Allows defining custom tab navigation for models.
- **Fieldset tabs:** Merges multiple fieldsets into tabs in the change form.
- **Sortable inlines:** Allows sorting inlines by dragging and dropping.
- **Environment label**: Distinguishes between environments by displaying a label.
- **Nonrelated inlines**: Displays nonrelated models as inlines in the change form.
- **Favicons**: Built-in support for configuring various site favicons.
- **Colors:** Allows customization of the default color scheme.
- **Changeform modes:** Displays fields in compressed mode in the change form.
- **Parallel admin**: Supports [running the default admin](https://unfoldadmin.com/blog/migrating-django-admin-unfold/?utm_medium=github&utm_source=unfold) alongside Unfold.
- **Third party packages:** Default support for multiple popular applications.
- **Configuration:** Most basic options can be changed in `settings.py`.
- **Dependencies:** Fully based on `django.contrib.admin`.
- **VS Code**: Project configuration and development container included.

classes.name: unfold.typing.ActionFunction
documentation:
Type that specifies functions that are used as actions (annotated with @actions decorator)
These are functions (__call__) and have 4 additional attributes
(allowed_permissions, short_description, url_path and attrs)

classes.name: unfold.views.UnfoldModelAdminViewMixin
documentation: Prepares views to be displayed in admin

functions.name: unfold.templatetags.unfold.do_capture
documentation:
Capture the contents of a tag output.
Usage:
.. code-block:: html+django

> {% capture %}..{% endcapture %} # output in {{ capture }}
> {% capture silent %}..{% endcapture %} # output in {{ capture }} only
> {% capture as varname %}..{% endcapture %} # output in {{ varname }}
> {% capture as varname silent %}..{% endcapture %} # output in {{ varname }} only

For example:
.. code-block:: html+django

> {# Allow templates to override the page title/description #}
> \<meta name="description" content="{% capture as meta_description %}
>
> > {% block meta-description %}{% endblock %}{% endcapture %}" />
>
> \<title>{% capture as meta_title %}{% block meta-title %}Untitled{% endblock %}{% endcapture %}\</title>
> {# copy the values to the Social Media meta tags #}
> \<meta property="og:description" content="{% block og-description %}{{ meta_description }}{% endblock %}" />
> \<meta name="twitter:title" content="{% block twitter-title %}{{ meta_title }}{% endblock %}" />

functions.name: unfold.templatetags.unfold.preserve_changelist_filters
documentation: Generate hidden input fields to preserve filters for POST forms.

documentation: Generate the list column headers.

functions.name: unfold.templatetags.unfold_list.result_list
documentation: Display the headers and data list together.

functions.name: unfold.templatetags.unfold_list.paginator_number

documentation: Return a BaseInlineFormSet class for use in admin add/change views.

documentation: Filter out any Unfold actions that the user doesn't have access to.

methods.name: unfold.admin.ModelAdmin._get_base_actions_list
documentation: Returns all available list global actions, prior to any filtering

methods.name: unfold.admin.ModelAdmin._get_base_actions_detail
documentation: Returns all available detail actions, prior to any filtering

methods.name: unfold.admin.ModelAdmin._get_base_actions_row
documentation: Returns all available row actions, prior to any filtering

methods.name: unfold.admin.ModelAdmin._get_base_actions_submit_line
documentation: Returns all available submit row actions, prior to any filtering

methods.name: unfold.admin.ModelAdmin.get_custom_urls
documentation:
Method to get custom views for ModelAdmin with their urls

Format of custom_urls item:
    ("path_to_view", "name_of_view", view_itself)

methods.name: unfold.admin.ModelAdmin.get_unfold_action
documentation:
Converts action name to UnfoldAction
\:param action:
\:return:

methods.name: unfold.admin.ModelAdmin._get_action_url
documentation:
Returns action URL if it was specified in @action decorator.
If it was not, name of the action is returned.
\:param func:
\:param name:
\:return:

methods.name: unfold.admin.ModelAdmin._get_instance_method
documentation:
Searches for method on self instance based on method_name and returns it if it exists.
If it does not exist or is not callable, it raises UnfoldException
\:param method_name: Name of the method to search for
\:return: method from self instance

methods.name: unfold.checks.UnfoldModelAdminChecks._check_unfold_action_permission_methods
documentation:
Actions with an allowed_permission attribute require the ModelAdmin to
implement a has_<perm>_permission() method for each permission.
